string-array.name: answer_arr
string-array.item: Xunyou Game Turbo man gi Nafas Mar Tugo kata XArena en gino mowal ne TECNO/Infinix mondo omed teko e yor tudruok e mbui gi tugo. Onyalo loso chandruok mar malo mar yor Tud e mbui, ngado Tud, gi etc kendo oket yor tudruok e mbui obed mayom kod tugo motegno. Otiyo go Wi-Fi kod wache mar yor tudruok e mbui mamoko (5G/4G/3G).
"Turbo mar tugo tiyo gi tuke mang'eny. Ka tuke moko ok nyal jiw, inyalo tudori e yor mbui gi josier kakiduare."
TECNO/Infinix ID e akaunt mar jatugo matiyo gi Xunyou Game Turbo e Nafas Mar Tugo kata XArena. Akaunt ka akaunt nyalo yudo ber manono kendo jiwo tich bang donjo.
1. Chak manyien mondo irang yor tudruok e mbui chudo. 2. Rang ka pesa manie akaunt michude oromo siro judo.
Yie to di yo midonjo go mondo isom %1$s kod %2$s.

string-array.name: question_arr
string-array.item: Tij turbo mar tugo en ango?
Tuke mage ma turbo mar tugo tiyo go?
Akaunt mane ma otudi gi turbo mar tugo?
Kaka inyalo loso chandruok e chudo?
"Kama inyalo some chike maling'ling'kachiel gi Singruok Mar Tiyo?"
